message:
feat(tui): add velocity sparkline and stale detection indicators to label view

- Add Unicode block character sparkline (▓▒░▁) showing issue velocity
  per label for quick health assessment
- Add stale detection tag display alongside velocity data
- Change label display from closed count to blocked count for better
  actionability signal
- Truncate label width 16→14 chars to accommodate sparkline column

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
